See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 2612022 => 'Antananarivo', 2612044 => 'Antsirabe', 2612047 => 'Ambositra', 2612053 => 'Toamasina', 2612054 => 'Ambatondrazaka', 2612056 => 'Moramanga', 2612057 => 'Maroantsetra/Sainte Marie', 2612062 => 'Mahajanga', 2612067 => 'Antsohihy', 2612069 => 'Maintirano', 26120722 => 'Manakara', 26120729 => 'Mananjary', 2612073 => 'Farafangana', 2612075 => 'Fianarantsoa', 2612076 => 'Antananarivo', 2612082 => 'Antsiranana', 2612086 => 'Nosy Be', 2612088 => 'Sambava', 2612092 => 'Taolañaro', 2612094 => 'Toliary', 2612095 => 'Morondava', ];
